page_metadata.biotools__summary: PubChem BioAssay Service expands upon PubChem. It is a set of web servers which provide for rapid data retrieval, integration, and comparison of biological screening results, exploratory structure-activity analysis and target selectivity examination.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: PubChem BioAssay Service expands upon PubChem. It is a set of web servers which provide for rapid data retrieval, integration, and comparison of biological screening results, exploratory structure-activity analysis and target selectivity examination.
